basic_details.job_title: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Sundargarh – Pediatrician, Medical Officer and More – 47 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Zilla Swasthya Samiti, Sundargarh (DPMU, NHM), Office of the CDM & PHO cum DMD, Sundargarh
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer-DTC, MO-MBBS at DEIC, Pediatrician at DEIC, MO-MBBS at UPHC-AAM, Medical Officer AYUSH (Collocated/RBSK/MHU), Optometrist-DEIC, Dental Technician-DEIC
basic_details.application_mode: Offline Prescribed application form to be brought to Walk-in Interview venue
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Sundargarh recruits 47 Pediatrician, Medical Officer and More Posts. Candidates with MBBS, Diploma, BAMS, BHMS can attend for walk in

age_limit.age_details: 1 year per completed contractual term, maximum 10 years over the prescribed upper age limit, subject to a ceiling of 55 years

selection_process: Walk-in Interview (Personal Interview / Career Assessment depending on post)
01 percentage of total examination marks for each completed term of service, maximum up to 10 percentage of total marks added to marks secured by the employee
how_to_apply: There is no online application process. Candidates must appear directly for the Walk-in Interview at the scheduled venue on the respective date for their post. The prescribed application form must be downloaded from www.sundargarh.odisha.gov.in, filled in completely and brought to the Walk-in Interview along with all required documents. Registration will be from 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM on the day of the Walk-in Interview. No application will be received beyond 11:00 AM.
seo_tags: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Sundargarh Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 47 Pediatrician, Medical Officer and More Posts
